title: xyris makuensis
intro: Xyris makuensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae, commonly known as the yellow-eyed grass. This plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Xyris makuensis include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems. Herbal preparations of Xyris makuensis can be made by infusing its leaves and flowers in water to create a tea or decoction, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
